essential_archive_sets.notes: Features Billy Strings sitting in. This is the 'Master meets the Student' tape.
High-altitude performance; captures the 'Mountain West' vibe of our map.

clogging_mechanics.observation: Jenny Keel’s bass playing is specifically tuned for percussive dancing—it’s the 'engine room' for the clogging board.

senior_facility_angle.theme: The Steel-String Revolution: How the guitar took over the lead role from the fiddle in the 20th century.
senior_facility_angle.biodiversity_overlay: Blue Ridge Parkway (Boone/Blowing Rock) heritage—Larry is a massive fisherman and outdoorsman; his music reflects the 'flow' of the river.
